face.structure: angular with high cheekbones, slightly pointed chin

eyes.shape: narrow almond with slight upwards tilt
eyes.color: dark brown with a hint of gold flecks
details: soft gradient shading from dark to light towards the center

face.expression: smirk suggesting a sardonic sense of humor

skin.texture: smooth with faint freckles across the nose
skin.rendering_notes: soft matte finish with subtle blushing on cheeks and nose

hair.flow: gently curving inwards towards the chin with slight flyaways

outfit.base: fitted denim jacket over a classic white t-shirt

composition.framing: medium close-up from the waist up
composition.pose: leaning slightly forward with arms crossed
composition.gesture: one eyebrow slightly raised, head tilted back slightly

background.color_palette: muted greys and blues with a pop of neon signs
background.rules: keep background understated to highlight character
